# SlidersHorizontal

## Tags
settings, filters, controls

## Categories
account

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/sliders-horizontal)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::SlidersHorizontal;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        SlidersHorizontal { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
